[[BLOCK:slide44_shape0]]
•   From the multiple-dot button, open a new SAS program file or press the F4 button on your keyboard.  
•   Paste the program below into the program file.  
```  
proc glmselect data=diabetes plots=coefficients;  
model Y = Age Gender BMI BP Total_Cholesterol LDL HDL TCH LTG Glucose /selection = elasticnet(choose=AICC);  
partition fraction(validate=0.3); /* Optionally partition data for validation */  
run;  
```  
•   The “/selection” option specifies which penalization method is used. In this case, Elastic NET (Elastic NET) is applied. It can be changed to LASSO (LASSO) or Ridge (Ridge).  
•   The “partition fraction” option divides the data into subsets for cross-validation. Essentially, it replicates the analysis. This will be discussed in detail in subsequent units.
